nodes.name: Receive Demo Request
nodes.notes: Public entry point. Header Auth credential must send x-demo-secret. Responds on receipt; the result is delivered by the callback node at the end.

nodes.name: Geocode Location
nodes.notes: alwaysOutputData is on so an unresolvable location still emits an item and can be reported as location_not_found instead of silently stalling the run.

nodes.name: Fetch Nearby Places
nodes.notes: Overpass is a free shared service and rate limits under load. The error output reports upstream_busy to the site instead of leaving the visitor waiting.

nodes.name: Analyze Lead
nodes.notes: Runs once per place. A single failed generation degrades that one card instead of killing the whole run.

nodes.name: Send Result To Website
nodes.notes: The callback URL and the one-time token both come from the request the website sent, so no long-lived site secret is stored inside this workflow. Retries 3x because during local dev the callback target is an ngrok tunnel, which can drop a connection briefly.
